ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-27-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rita Howell.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Mercury Casualty Company.
Plaintiff's Witness: William Meyer, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Wilson Woo as follows:
Principal $100,000.00
Costs $392.50, for a total of $100,392.50
Judgment signed in open court.
